examples: Thee counterblow from Brussels, slipped into late drafts of the proposal, will be welcomed by EUbanks that complain of an unlevel playing field with US rivals.
Combination with the characteristic of the free combat, the author designs a set of feasible training method of developing the athletes to defend the consciousness of counterblow.
Comparison with the test of two groups studies show that adopting training of defending the consciousness of counterblow can improve the athletes actual combat consciousness and level strikingly.
